summary: Frontend UI/UX enhancement testing completed. All 9 requested features verified working: hero section with 5 rotating background images (6-second intervals), fade-in animations, image indicator dots for manual navigation, 'Take Assessment' button in navbar navigating to /self-assessment, 'Book a Session' button navigating to /team, 'Help Me Find a Therapist' modal working, Playfair Display font on headings, DM Sans font on body text (fixed CSS issue), and hover effects on section cards.

hero_rotating_images.details: 5 background images found, rotation confirmed working (6-second interval). Image changed from index 0 to 1 after 7 seconds.

hero_animations.details: 10+ elements with animate-* classes found. Fade-in and scale effects working on hero content.

image_indicator_dots.details: 5 indicator dots found at bottom of hero. Manual navigation works correctly - clicking dot 3 activated image 2.

take_assessment_navbar.details: 'Take Assessment' button visible in navbar, navigates correctly to /self-assessment

book_session_hero.details: 'Book a Session' button found with data-testid='book-session-hero-btn', navigates to /team

help_me_find_modal.details: 'Help Me Find a Therapist' button opens modal successfully

typography_playfair.details: Playfair Display font correctly applied to h1: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif

typography_dm_sans.details: DM Sans font now correctly applied to body (fixed index.css override issue)

hover_effects.details: 5 elements with hover:-translate-y-2, 15 with hover:shadow-xl, 53 with transition-all

trust_indicators.details: All 3 trust indicators visible: '100% Confidential', 'Licensed Therapists', 'Safe & Secure'

context_for_next_testing_agent: All UI/UX enhancements working correctly: 1) Hero section with 5 rotating background images (6-second intervals with crossfade) 2) Manual indicator dots for image navigation 3) 'Take Assessment' button in navbar (replaces 'Book a Therapist') 4) Playfair Display on headings, DM Sans on body 5) All animations working (animate-fade-in, animate-pulse-soft, etc.) 6) Hover effects on cards (hover:-translate-y-2, hover:shadow-xl). Fixed: index.css body font-family was overriding global DM Sans - updated to include DM Sans as primary font.

fix_applied.issue: Body font-family in index.css was using system fonts instead of DM Sans
fix_applied.fix: Updated body font-family to 'DM Sans', 'Poppins', -apple-system... as primary fonts
